title: Create Live 5
description: Skyblock Modpack, which is all about the Mod Create
body: # Create Live 5 - Skyblock Edition Welcome to **Create Live 5 - Skyblock Edition**, where innovation meets the limitless skies! Prepare to embark on an extraordinary journey in the boundless expanse of the skies, powered by the unparalleled creativity of the Create mod. This unique modpack brings a whole new playstyle to the classic Skyblock experience, enriched with an array of exciting Create addons. Create Live started as a Modpack for a german content creator group, which wanted to play with the mod Create. [](https://blizzor.de/cl5-server)
